title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Questions on professional sport and ethics.

questions.question: Do professional athletes earn too much money compared to other professions?
Is winning more important than playing fairly in professional sports?

script.text: Do professional athletes earn too much money compared to other professions?
Is winning more important than playing fairly in professional sports?
What qualities do you think a person needs to become a professional athlete?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
